chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text:
5624 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ اِبْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ قَالَ :
سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ فَرِيضَةِ اَلْجَدِّ فَقَالَ
"مَا أَعْلَمُ أَحَداً مِنَ اَلنَّاسِ قَالَ فِيهَا إِلاَّ بِالرَّأْيِ إِلاَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَإِنَّهُ قَالَ فِيهَا بِقَوْلِ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5624 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Ibn Udhaynah from Zurarah, who said:
I asked Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about the inheritance share (fariḍah) of the grandfather.
Imam (as) replied: "I do not know anyone among the people who has spoken about it except based on personal opinion, except for Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), for He (as) spoke about it according to the saying of the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family)."
